title: androcalva pearnii
intro: Androcalva pearnii, also known as the 'Peppermint Gum', is a species of flowering plant in the family Cunoniaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat a variety of health issues. The health benefits of Androcalva pearnii include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
